title: Replace emojis with icons in Clungcord

log.context: Replace emojis with icons in Clungcord

Done. Here is what was changed:

**New file:** `/mnt/data/clungcord/packages/client/src/components/Icons.tsx` -- seven inline SVG icon components (IconHash, IconSearch, IconPlus, IconX, IconMenu, IconEdit, IconTrash). Zero external dependencies.

**Modified files:**
- `Sidebar.tsx` -- replaced `✕` (close), `🔍` (magnifying glass emoji), and `+` text with `<IconX>`, `<IconSearch>`, and `<IconPlus>` SVGs
- `MessagePane.tsx` -- replaced `☰` (hamburger), `#` text span, `✎` ...(truncated)
